name: @ray-studio/ingestion
description: Ray Studio ingestion package — Tree-sitter parser (103) + Symbol Extractor (104) + Dependency Graph B.2 (105) + Incremental Index Builder B.2 (102) + Live Context adapters B.2 (101)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { cpSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import { join } from 'node:path'; const src=join('src','extractor','queries'); const dst=join('dist','extractor','queries'); mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); for (const f of readdirSync(src)) if (f.endsWith('.scm')) cpSync(join(src,f), join(dst,f));"
